title: Favorite Folder
excerpt:

posts.author: CWithrow (Christina Withrow)
posts.cookedHtml:
I manage projects for multiple people who each have their own portfolio of projects. I have most of their boards and work grouped into folders.

It would be great for them to have the ability to favorite a folder rather than having to favorite all the individual boards.

This way, as new projects are added to their plates I can just add it to their folder and it will automatically be in their favorites.

posts.author: pjimenez (Pedro Jimenez)
posts.cookedHtml: Completely agree. I started to apply projects boards into a folder that are assigned to specific project owners. I was surprised to see that you couldn’t favorite that folder.

posts.author: MarkP (Mark)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d love to see functionality added that would allow users to mark folders as favorites instead of just individual boards.

posts.author: DanielGarza (Daniel Garza)
posts.cookedHtml: Can Folders feature be added to Favorites in order to rearrange better all our favorites boards?

posts.author: kellie.bullivant (Kellie Bullivant)
posts.cookedHtml: Great idea, I’ve had a number of staff asking if this is possible recently and for it to be possible would be a great benefit.
